samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_16bit">
    <description>Implement an unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="start">Chip enable signal to initiate multiplication.</input>
        <input id="ain" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplicand input.</input>
        <input id="bin" width_description="[15:0]">Multiplier input.</input>
        <output id="yout" width_description="[31:0]">Product output.</output>
        <output id="done">Completion flag indicating the end of multiplication.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="i">Shift count register, 0 to 16.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <sequential_logic id="i">
            <description>Shift count register updated at the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset.</description>
            <condition>
                <item>Reset is active (rst_n == 0), set i to 0.</item>
                <item>Start is active and i is less than 17, increment i by 1.</item>
                <item>Start is inactive, reset i to 0.</item>
            </condition>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="done">
            <description>Multiplication completion flag updated at the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset.</description>
            <condition>
                <item>Reset is active (rst_n == 0), set done_r to 0.</item>
                <item>i is equal to 16, set done_r to 1.</item>
                <item>i is equal to 17, reset done_r to 0.</item>
            </condition>
        </sequential_logic>
        <sequential_logic id="registers">
            <description>Multiplicand (areg), multiplier (breg), and product (yout_r) registers updated at the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset.</description>
            <condition>
                <item>Reset is active (rst_n == 0), set areg, breg, and yout_r to 0.</item>
                <item>Start is active and i is 0, load areg with ain and breg with bin.</item>
                <item>i is greater than 0 and less than 17, and bit i-1 in areg is 1, accumulate yout_r with the shifted breg.</item>
            </condition>
        </sequential_logic>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
    The module implements an unsigned 16-bit multiplier using shift and accumulate operations. 
    On the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset, the shift count register (i) is updated. 
    During reset, i is set to 0. When start is active and i is less than 17, i is incremented by 1. 
    If start is inactive, i is reset to 0.
    
    The multiplication completion flag (done) is generated by monitoring the value of i. 
    On the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset, done is updated. 
    When i equals 16, done is set to 1, indicating the multiplication is complete. 
    When i equals 17, done is reset to 0, indicating the multiplication is not complete.
    
    On the positive edge of the clock or the negative edge of the reset, the multiplicand (areg), 
    multiplier (breg), and product (yout_r) registers are updated. 
    During reset, these registers are set to 0. When start is active and i is 0, 
    areg is loaded with ain and breg with bin. When i is greater than 0 and less than 17, 
    if the bit at position i-1 in areg is 1, yout_r accumulates the shifted value of breg.
    </implementation>
</module>
